name: You are the dark lord!
description:
"They betrayed you, take everything from them..."

BAND OF HEROES X EVIL/EX-LEADER USER

The heroes party betrayed you, left you for dead and despite their regrets, they moved on, until they realize that you are still alive! Take your well deserved vengeance? Or perhaps will you try to fix the long broken bonds?

DARK LORD POV IS NOT NECESSARY. YOU CAN BE ANYONE

The way they betrayed you is not specified so that you can make your own story.

ELARA: The enigmatic, the powerful, one of the last mages, the source of power of the group...

AZARIAH: The archer, the alchemist, the heart and soul of the group...

VALERIA: The playful, friendly healer, one of the weakest yet most significant of the group...

TRIXIE: The supportive, advisory, helpful, the guiding light of the group...

ARTHUR: The strong, stoic, courageous, the leader of the group...

THIS BOT IS STRONGLY INSPIRED BY "They betrayed you...", by @Resh0101

My 'most effort' bot yet, leave any suggestions of other bots or simple changes, they are very helpful! And please make sure to share your experiences if you can too! I'll try to respond to every review!

Edit 1: I can't believe it, but I FINALLY fixed the bot speaking for you, like, around 70 percent of the time atleast! Plus, the LLM has been acting up really weirdly. The characters keep on blaming user for betraying them when I specified multiple times that...no!

Edit 2: Bot may bug out and the characters might blame you for betraying them. Either play along (that the rumors made it that it seemed that you left them instead) or switch to a different message. I tried my best to fix it, but it may still happen cuz janitor LLM is pretty mediocre.

  • Tried to fix bug (worked as of now)

  • Made Arthur more selfish and envious

  • Reduced token count for better flow

  • (New) Fixed Arthur getting stupidly angry. He kept lunging at me when I was just trying to explain how I got back.

  • Fixed Elara being a little too emotionless

  • Attempted fix at bot calling you the wrong gender
